message:
🌱 Add atlantis: Changes in recloning for merge strategy leads to mission (#1061)

@@ -0,0 +1,77 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "atlantis-3474-changes-in-recloning-for-merge-strategy-leads-to-disappearing-plan",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "atlantis: Changes in recloning for merge strategy leads to disappearing plans",
+    "description": "Changes in recloning for merge strategy leads to disappearing plans. This issue affects 30+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify atlantis troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your atlantis deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n atlantis -l app.kubernetes.io/name=atlantis\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=atlantis -n atlantis --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review atlantis configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant atlantis configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n atlantis -l app.kubernetes.io/name=atlantis\nkubectl get configmap -n atlantis -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=atlantis\n```\n### Community Note\n\n* Please vote on this issue by adding a 👍 [reaction](https://blog.github.com/2016-03-10-add-reactions-to-pull-requests-issues-and-comments/) to the original issue to help the community and maintainers prioritize this request."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Changes in recloning for merge strategy leads to…",
+        "description": "## what\n\nWhen using the merge checkout strategy, only check for upstream changes and re-clone when creating a plan. \n\n## why\n\nPreviously we would check for upstream changes and merge them during any call to Clone(), but if we had already made a plan, this would remove the generated plan. This would\n```yaml\nTop of my repos.yaml:\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm Changes in recloning for merge strategy leads to… is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=atlantis -n atlantis --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n atlantis --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "## what\n\nWhen using the merge checkout strategy, only check for upstream changes and re-clone when creating a plan. \n\n## why\n\nPreviously we would check for upstream changes and merge them during any call to Clone(), but if we had already made a plan, this would remove the generated plan.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "Top of my repos.yaml:"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
